code:
sequenceDiagram participant P as Player participant Boot as Bootstrap participant LD as DNS resolver participant AD as Authoritative DNS server participant SM as cDS::Session Management participant sNA as cDS::Node-A participant sNB as cDS::Node-B participant TC as cDS::TC participant NA as cDS::Node-C participant CS as cDS::Content Steering Servers participant TE as cDS::Telemetry autonumber P->>Boot: get session bootstrap Boot->>P: Bootstrap details e.g. endpoint, ad serving parameters, etc %% resolve Session Management server domain name P->>LD: query cDS::Session Management domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Session Management domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Session Management Server IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Session Mangement Server IP %% request master manifest from Session Management server Note over P, SM: request master manifest from cDS::Session Management P->>SM: GET /master manifest Note over P, SM: #35;EXTM3U
#35;EXT-X-VERSION:3
#35;EXT-X-CONTENT-STEERING:SERVER-URI="https://cs.harmonic.com/"
#35;EXT-X-STREAM-INF:PROGRAM-ID=1,BANDWIDTH=2297761,RESOLUTION=960x540,FRAME-RATE=30.000,PATHWAY-ID="cDS::Node-A"
https://nodeA.harmonic.com/01.m3u8
#35;EXT-X-STREAM-INF:PROGRAM-ID=1,BANDWIDTH=2297761,RESOLUTION=960x540,FRAME-RATE=30.000,PATHWAY-ID="cDS::Node-B"
http://nodeB.harmonic.com/01.m3u8
#35;EXT-X-STREAM-INF:PROGRAM-ID=1,BANDWIDTH=2297761,RESOLUTION=960x540,FRAME-RATE=30.000,PATHWAY-ID="cDS::TC"
https://tc.harmonic.com/01.m3u8..... SM->>P: 200 OK\n(master manifest) %% request steering manifest from Content Steering server Note over P, CS: request steering manifest from cDS: Content Steering P->>LD: query cDS::Content Steering domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Content Steering domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Content Steering Server IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Content Steering Server IP P->>CS: GET /steering manifest Note over CS, P: {
"VERSION": 1,
"TTL": 300,
"PATHWAY-PRIORITY: ["cDS::Node-A", "cDS::Node-B", "cDS::TC"]
} CS->>P: 200 OK\n(steering manifest) Note over P, sNA: request variant manifest from cDS::Node A P->>LD: query cDS::Node A domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Node A domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Node A IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Node A IP P->>sNA: TCP SYN Note over P, sNA: cDS::Node A is down
TCP retransmission timer timeout
Player fail over to cDS::Node B Note over TE: cDS::Telemetry detect cDS::Node A is down par TE->>CS: update routing decision (remove cDS::Node A) and TE->>SM: update routing decision (remove cDS::Node A) end Note over P, sNB: Player fail over to cDS::Node B P->>LD: query cDS::Node B domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Node B domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Node B IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Node B IP Note over P, sNB: GET /variant manifest P->>sNB: TCP SYN sNB->>P: ACK, SYN P->>sNB: SYN Note over P, sNB: #35;EXTM3U
#35;EXT-X-TARGETDURATION:4
#35;EXT-X-MEDIA-SEQUENCE:432137172
#35;EXT-X-VERSION:3
#35;EXT-X-PROGRAM-DATE-TIME:2024-10-10T08:24:48.831Z
#35;EXTINF:3,
20240927T075714-01-432137172.ts
#35;EXT-X-PROGRAM-DATE-TIME:2024-10-10T08:24:52.031Z
EXTINF:5,
20240927T075714-01-432137173.ts
#35;......... sNB->>P: 200 OK\n(variant manifest) %% establish TCP connection, 3 way handshake Note over P, sNB: request video segments P->>sNB: GET /20240927T075714-01-432137172.ts %% cDS:: Node start to push video segment Note over sNB, P: server start pushing video segments sNB->>P: TCP segment (seq_num = 0) sNB->>P: TCP segment (seq_num = 100) P->>sNB: ACK (seq_num = 101) %% packet start missing and player request retransmission sNB->>P: TCP segment(seq_num = 200) sNB->>P: TCP segment(seq_num = 300) Note over sNB, P: packet loss, retransmission timer timeout, send duplicate ACK to request retransmission P->>sNB: ACK (seq_num = 101) sNB->>P: reset connection sNB->>TE: report packet loss par TE->>CS: update routing decision (remove cDS::Node B) and TE->>SM: update routing decision (remove cDS::Node B) end %% player fail over to cDS::TC Note over P, TC: Player fail over to cDS::TC P->>LD: query cDS::TC domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::TC domain name AD->>LD: cDS::TC IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::TC IP P->> TC: GET /variant manifest TC->>P: 302 Found\nLocation: cDS::Node C P->>LD: query cDS::Node C domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Node C domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Node C IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Node C IP P->>NA: GET /variant manifest NA->>P: 200 OK\n(variant manifest) loop P->>NA: GET video/audio segments NA->>P: 200 OK\n(video/audio segments) end Note over P, CS: steering manifest expire, request an updated steering manifest P->>CS: GET /steering manifest Note over CS, P: cDS::Node A and cDS::Node B are removed from the list
{
"VERSION": 1,
"TTL": 300,
"PATHWAY-PRIORITY: ["cDS::TC"]
} CS->>P: 200 OK\n(steering manifest)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的cDS直播会话流程图，重点展示Player怎么从Bootstrap开始，一路拿到视频流，还要包含故障切换的逻辑。先确认一下参与方：Player、Bootstrap、DNS resolver、Authoritative DNS server，然后是cDS内部的几大模块。
明白，cDS内部模块比较多，我列一下：Session Management负责下发master manifest，Node-A和Node-B是边缘节点，TC是流量控制节点，Node-C是备用节点，Content Steering Servers做调度决策，Telemetry负责监控上报。这个理解对吗？
对，而且TC和Node-C的关系要注意——TC收到请求会302跳转到Node-C，这是关键 failover 路径。我们先从Player启动开始画。
好，我先画第一步：Player向Bootstrap发起get session bootstrap，Bootstrap返回endpoint和广告参数这些Bootstrap details。
接下来是DNS解析环节。Player需要知道Session Management的IP，所以先查DNS resolver，resolver再去问Authoritative DNS server，拿到IP后返回给Player。
已添加：Player→LD查询cDS::Session Management域名，LD→AD查询，AD返回IP，LD再把IP给Player。然后Player向SM发起GET /master manifest。
master manifest的内容要体现清楚，里面要有EXT-X-CONTENT-STEERING标签指向Content Steering Server，还有三条STREAM-INF分别对应Node-A、Node-B和TC的pathway。
我在Note里标注了master manifest的详细内容：#EXTM3U、VERSION:3、SERVER-URI指向cs.harmonic.com，三条PATHWAY-ID分别是cDS::Node-A、cDS::Node-B、cDS::TC，带宽都是2297761。SM返回200 OK。
Player拿到master manifest后，要去Content Steering Server拿steering manifest决定优先走哪个节点。这里又要走一遍DNS解析流程。
已画：Player→LD→AD→LD→P的DNS流程，然后Player向CS发起GET /steering manifest。CS返回的JSON里VERSION为1，TTL 300秒，PATHWAY-PRIORITY顺序是Node-A、Node-B、TC。
现在Player按优先级先连Node-A。再画一轮DNS解析拿到Node-A的IP，然后TCP三次握手。但这里要设计故障场景——Node-A挂了，Player超时后failover到Node-B。
画了Player查询Node-A域名、拿到IP、发TCP SYN，然后在Note里标注"cDS::Node A is down，TCP retransmission timer timeout，Player fail over to cDS::Node B"。
同时Telemetry要检测到Node-A故障，并行通知Content Steering和Session Management，把Node-A从调度列表里摘掉。用par块表示并行。
加了Note"cDS::Telemetry detect cDS::Node A is down"，然后par块里两条线：TE→CS和TE→SM，都是update routing decision (remove cDS::Node A)。
Player切到Node-B，再走一遍DNS解析，拿到Node-B的IP。这次TCP三次握手成功，然后GET variant manifest。

画了完整的Node-B DNS流程，TCP SYN、ACK-SYN、SYN三次握手成功。然后Player发GET /variant manifest，我在Note里详细写了variant manifest内容：TARGETDURATION 4、MEDIA-SEQUENCE、PROGRAM-DATE-TIME、两个ts片段20240927T075714-01-432137172.ts和173.ts。
variant manifest返回200 OK。接下来Player开始请求视频片段，Node-B主动推送TCP segment，这里要展示seq num和ACK的交互，然后设计丢包重传场景。
画了Player GET第一个ts片段，Note标注"server start pushing video segments"。然后Node-B→Player推送TCP segment (seq_num = 0)、(seq_num = 100)，Player回ACK (seq_num = 101)。
继续：Node-B再发seq_num = 200和300，但这里丢包了。我加Note"packet loss, retransmission timer timeout, send duplicate ACK to request retransmission"，Player重发ACK (seq_num = 101)。
丢包严重，Node-B直接reset连接，同时Telemetry上报丢包事件，再次并行通知CS和SM把Node-B也摘掉。这是第二次故障切换。
画了Node-B→Player reset connection，Node-B→TE report packet loss。然后par块：TE→CS和TE→SM都是update routing decision (remove cDS::Node B)。
现在Node-A和Node-B都不可用了，Player只能failover到TC。再走DNS解析流程，Player向TC请求variant manifest，TC返回302 Found，Location指向Node-C。
画了完整的TC DNS流程，Player→TC GET /variant manifest，TC→Player 302 Found，Location: cDS::Node C。
Player收到302后，再解析Node-C的域名，拿到IP后直接请求Node-C的variant manifest，这次200 OK成功返回。
画了Node-C的DNS流程，Player→NA GET /variant manifest，NA→Player 200 OK (variant manifest)。
最后画一个循环：Player持续从Node-C获取音视频片段，用loop块表示。然后还要体现steering manifest过期后的更新逻辑。
加了loop块，里面Player→NA GET video/audio segments，NA→Player 200 OK (video/audio segments)。然后Note标注"steering manifest expire, request an updated steering manifest"。
Player→CS GET /steering manifest，返回的JSON里PATHWAY-PRIORITY只剩cDS::TC了，Node-A和Node-B已经被移除。CS→Player 200 OK (steering manifest)。
等等，我需要确认一下TC和Node-C的关系。TC是调度层，Node-C是实际服务节点，302跳转后Player是直接和Node-C通信，不再经过TC，对吗？
对的，302之后Player直接连Node-C，后续所有segment请求都是P-NA，没有再走TC。这个逻辑图里已经体现清楚了。
还有一个细节：master manifest里的SERVER-URI是https://cs.harmonic.com/，这个和后面steering manifest的请求要对上。另外，所有DNS解析流程都要保持一致的交互模式。
检查了，CS域名cs.harmonic.com在master manifest的SERVER-URI里，后续Player查询cDS::Content Steering domain name、LD→AD查询、返回IP的流程都画全了。所有DNS环节都是P-LD-AD-LD-P的四步模式。
很好，整个流程完整了：从Bootstrap启动，到DNS解析、master manifest、steering manifest、Node-A故障切换、Node-B丢包切换、最终TC 302到Node-C，还有Telemetry驱动的动态调度更新。可以定稿了。
